name: Pistachio Torte
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Unsalted pistachio nuts - finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Butter and flour a 9-inch springform pan.
In a bowl, cream the butter and 1 cup of sugar together until light and fluffy. Add the egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition. Add the bread crumbs and all but a scant 1/4 cup of pistachios. Beat for 1 minute to combine. Set aside.
In a separate copper or stainless bowl, beat the egg whites until soft peaks form. Add the remaining tablespoon sugar and continue to beat until soft dry peaks form.
Whisk one third of the whites into the pistachio mixture to lighten. Then gently fold in the remaining whites.
Pour into the prepared pan and smooth top with a spatula. Bake 30-35 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool on a wire rack for 1 hour. Remove the sides of the springform pan and continue to cool torte completely.
Spread 1 cup of lemon curd garnish on top and sprinkle with reserved pistachios.
Serves 8-10
